chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1975 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 17887/16 3. For Katcha Peshi. 23.12.2016. Mr. Muhammad Hassan Chandio, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel. -.-.-. Today, in compliance of the Court’s order, respondents No.3 and 6 namely Muhammad Akram and Mst. Mukhtiar are present in person. Respondent No.3 (Muhammad Akram) is real father of petitioner lady and he submits that he has not extended any threat to petitioner nor they will cause any harassment to the petitioners in future. With this statement, this petition is disposed of with the directions to the official respondents to ensure that life and liberty of the petitioners are not violated by private respondents or any other individual in any manner whatsoever. JUDGE Ali Haider
